ddt:Target.Name: FKk2_LFD_HZx_v2.3_190924.xml
ddt:Target.Description:
2019/07/03 Add FFD Data DID
2019/04/03 Add DTCs $P0791, $P0792, $P0793, $P2765, $P2766, $P2767, $P2745, $P2746, $P2747, $P17F0, $P17F1, $P17F2
2019/03/04 Add Auto-identification
2018/08/20 Add Projects "x79, xFF, xHA, xHAph2, xJC, xJD"
2018/06/22 Modify screen "Clear Self-learning data " to "Clear QR code and learning data"
2016/05/26 Modify screen "After G-Sensor Replacement" Modifiy data "ApprovalNumber.BasicPartList"
2015/10/16 Add DTC P0947 Modify $2101 #111 byte to monitoring MEX function modify screen $21$A1 Delete screen "EEPROM when update SW"
2015/05/08 Modify to check "Maintainability report"
2015/01/21 Make screen function " Clear EEPROM when update SW" Modify screen function "Multiplex network dianostic"
2014/12/11 Modify screen function(add "START" button) Modify $21A0, $21A1, $21A2, $2101 Change file name.(This xml file is based on "CVT_FKk2_LFD_HZx_M4R_M5R_v1.4.xml". This xml is for SW1.5
2014/09/30
Add screen function for EEPROM clear
2014/06/23 Add $21A0, $21A1, $21A2, $21A3 Add screen function.
2014/02/18 Sujin IM Add vehicle projects.
2014/02/17 Sujin IM Modify DTC code. Modify $1906, $1902 value. Add $1086, $14000000, $11FA, $11FF, $1906, $2101, $2131, $2181,$30011100, $30011101, $300112000, $30012001, $310100, $310101, $310200, $310201, $310300, $310301, $310401, $310500, $310501, $310801 requests. Delete $10FA, $1904000000FF, $190600000081 requests. Addition of screen[Identification]
2011/11/16 XX4 R.Urushihata Modify $2182 requests.
2011/10/26 XX4 M.Katsura Modify $1902 request.
2011/04/27 XX4 M.Katsura Modify $2182 value.
2011/04/12 XX4 M.Katsura Add Diag version $30. Add some DTC code. Modify $2102 value.
2011/04/06 XX4 M.Katsura Modify RDBCID $1112, $1113 & $1124 values.
2011/03/29 XX4 M.Katsura` Add RDBCID $120B. Modify RDBCID $110F value. Modify RDBCID $1124 value.
2011/02/07 XX4 M.Katsura Add support check for RDBCID. Add LID$FA for SDS. Add SRBLID FB. Add some DTC.
2010/04/26 XX4 R.Urushihata SRBLID FA added
2009/08/21 XX4 K.Jousyu modified some DTC.
2009/08/20 XX4 K.Jousyu modified some DTC.
2009/06/22 XX4.D.Muramatsu some Datamonitor added SRBLID FA added
Initial create: The ECU is based on 25953NDS07[1]. 2007/12/04 NISSAN XX4 Y.Hasegawa
[2.17]
Oct, 2013 Dongseok.kim@renaultsamsungM.com - Modification to DTC code - Addition of Screen [ROM Identication], which is used temporarily for SW0

Data.Name: controlStatus
Data.Comment: Give information about the status of the requested control and other related information

Data.Name: DTCStatusAvailabilityMask
Data.Comment: same as statusOfDTC and represents the status bits that are supported by the server

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: RoutineEntryStatus
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Data.Name: RoutineEntryStatus_1
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Electric Oil Pump - power supply system failure
Electric Oil Pump - Relay Stuck ON

Data.Name: DataRead_I CON.ECO SW mode verdict upshot

Item.Text: Electric Oil Pump - power supply system failure
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: BrakeInfoStatus (CAN)
Data.Comment: Brake information status received from ABS

Data.Name: Line pressure solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of line pressure solenoid

Item.Text: In case of Bench Mode state

Data.Name: TorqueRequestStatus _CAN
Data.Comment: Type of torque request sent by gearbox to the engine

Data.Name: Saturated Engine Torque Down Request Value

Item.Text: TCS Shift Schedule Change Signal OFF
TCS Shift Schedule Change Signal ON
TCS Shift Schedule Change Signal2 OFF
TCS Shift Schedule Change Signal2 ON

Data.Name: Gear Ratio
Data.Comment: Current gear ratio (primary pulley speed/secondary pulley speed)

Data.Name: EEprom Flag
Data.Comment: Flag that indicates the writing in EEprom is well done

Data.Name: CrankingAuthorization_AT_CAN
Data.Comment: Autorization by the gearbox for engine to crank

Data.Name: Gear engaged _manual mode
Data.Comment: Gear engaged (from 1 to 8) when gearbox running in manual mode

Data.Name: Lock up solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of lock-up solenoid

Item.Text: Kick down activated under LU engaging

Data.Name: Normal Engine Torque Down Request Value

Item.Text: await a completion judgment of EOP Air deflation
LU inhibition when Hydraulic control system failure
LU inhibition when low engine rotation
LU inhibition when LU signal off

Data.Name: DILS End by Turbine Slip Counter

Item.Text: CLine pressure SOL open or short to battery(HIGH failure)
Line pressure SOL short to gound(LOW failure)
Line pressure SOL functional problem (oil pressure control system adnormality)
Pri pressure SOL disconnection, sky-involved(HIGH trouble)
PVIGN OFF trouble (battery power supply LOW))

Data.Name: AT_MinimumIdleSpeedRequest_CAN
Data.Comment: Minimum requested value of engine idle speed

Data.Name: AT_TorqueControlType _CAN
Data.Comment: Type of torque control performed to the engine

Item.Text: Electric Oil Pump - Relay Stuck ON
Electric Oil Pump - power supply system failure
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure_Open circuit with no pulse
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other2
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other1
Turbine revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other1
Turbine revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other2
Turbine revolution speed sensor failure_Open circuit with no pulse
Primary revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other1
Primary revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other2
Primary revolution speed sensor failure_Open circuit with no pulse
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

DataItem.Name: Saturated Engine Torque Down Request Value
Normal Engine Torque Down Request Value
DILS End by Turbine Slip Counter

Request.Name: SPBLIDPR.Start Forward Clutch Meetpoint Learing Status
Read date of last after-sales operation

Device.Name: Electric Oil Pump - Relay Stuck ON
Electric Oil Pump - power supply system failure
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure_Open circuit with no pulse
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other2
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other1
Turbine revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other1
Turbine revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other2
Turbine revolution speed sensor failure_Open circuit with no pulse
Primary revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other1
Primary revolution speed sensor failure_Rationality other2
Primary revolution speed sensor failure_Open circuit with no pulse

Label.Text: Multiplex network diagnostic
A0 : Torque management
A1 : Gear shifts management
A2 : ATCU inputs/outputs management
Self-learning flag
A3 : ATCU failure management
This screen allow to ignore ABS malfunction due to run on dynamo bench with rear wheels fixed
If the screen isn't displayed in real time, you can use manual reporting request
Don't forget to initialize screen with green button then start reading
Current situation

Button.Text: To ignore ABS malfunction, to get normal lock-up behavior
To come back to complete diagnostic (normal status)

Screen.Name: Clear QR code and learning data

Label.Text: Clear QR code and Learning data
ATCU is replaced by new one >> Please use manual request function
1. Extract QR code from old ATCU using Service $2104
2. Replace New one, write QR code using service $3B04+QR code from old ATCU
3. Ignition OFF and wait about 3 seconds
CVT is replaced by new one
1. Prepare QR code(The package of CVT includes CD-ROM)
2. Erase QR code ($11FF) in below condition
R range, Vehicle stopped, Engine stopped, Ignition ON, Accelerator pedal ON
CVT INFORMATION ON PRODUCTION No.1
CVT INFORMATION ON PRODUCTION No.2
CVT INFORMATION ON PRODUCTION No.3
CVT Control Valve Information No.1
CVT Control Valve Information No.2
CVT Control Valve Information No.3
3. Write QR code from CD-ROM using $3B04+QR code (use manual request)
Then you can see that 6 monitoring values in the list below are immediately changed to "0"
4. Ignition OFF and wait 3 seconds
5. Replace the CVT, and make ignition ON
Self-learning flag
If QR code is not in EEPRON, self learning flag is displayed as "self learning NOK"
After G-Sensor replacement, you need to initialize it to "zero" value
Turn ignition switch ON, engine OFF, vehicle at standstill, shift lever in P, brake pedal pressed
CAUTION : Never engine start
CALIBRATE G SENSOR
